title: excavatia mariannensis
intro: Excavatia mariannensis, also known as the "Mountain Rose" or " Marianna Rose", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a climbing shrub native to the Philippines, with medicinal properties derived from its roots and leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Excavatia mariannensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
